sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 77:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 77:1
items.html: The NHY of Keter return only the HB that are clean from the bottom Hey into the phase of Rosh. This does not help the lower seven that incorporate the bottom Hey at all. However, NHY of AK shines the dot inside the letters, which is the incorporation of the bottom Hey, and from there the lower seven of Nekudim are extended. (Inner Observation, Item 13)
